scripts.build: echo 'nothing to build for this package itself — @prisma/compose-prisma-cloud builds via turbo ^build'
scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-streams... && ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose deploy module.ts ${STREAMS_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STREAMS_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-compose destroy module.ts --production ${STREAMS_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STREAMS_STACK_NAME"} )
